data.acceptance:
1. Pending dir is sharded as <store>/.pending-recipient-adds/<app>/<env>/...
2. Concurrent recipient-add flows across namespaces don't see each other's signatures.
3. Migration moves existing flat-layout pending files into the sharded layout on first use.
4. docs/recipient-quorum.md updated to show the new path.
5. Integration test exercises two-namespace concurrency.
